info.name: My Collections — Users
info.description:
User profile endpoints. All require a valid Bearer token in the Authorization header.

Set the 'accessToken' environment variable first (obtain via auth.collection.json).

header.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /auth/token

request.description:
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

This is the end-to-end proof the OAuth2 system works: the request will be rejected with 401 if the Bearer token is missing, expired, or tampered.
